completion.title: Well done! Your first recording has been successfully processed

record.title: Discover Recording Page
record.message: Discover the main features for recording your memos:

recording.title: Recording
recording.description: Long press the big round button to start recording and press again to stop

blueprints.title: Templates
blueprints.description: Choose different AI analysis templates for your recordings

language.title: Language
language.description: Set the recording language for optimal transcription

memos.title: Discover Memoro: Your Memos
memos.message: Manage and organize your processed recordings:

browse.title: Memos Overview
browse.description: Browse your memos and tap them to open

search.title: Add Tags
search.description: Organize your memos by assigning tags to them

organize.title: Selection Mode
organize.description: Select multiple memos and combine them or assign tags

spaces.title: Discover Memoro: Spaces - Collaborate
spaces.message: Spaces allow you to share memos with others and organize them together.

settings.title: Discover Memoro: Settings
settings.message: Here you can adjust your preferences, change languages, and manage your account.

memo_detail.title: Discover Memoro: Memo Details
memo_detail.message: Explore the key features of your memo:

share.title: Share
share.description: Share memo content via various formats

edit.title: Edit & Ask
edit.description: Ask questions or edit transcript manually

space_detail.title: Discover Memoro: Space Details
space_detail.message: Here you can view all memos in the space and invite new members.

audio_archive.title: Discover Memoro: Audio Archive
audio_archive.message: Here you'll find all your original audio files for listening and management.

reupload.title: Re-upload
reupload.description: Upload recordings again for further processing

blueprints.title: Discover Memoro: Blueprints
blueprints.message: Blueprints are different analysis modes for your recordings. Each mode uses specific AI prompts to process your conversations exactly how you need them.

modes.title: Analysis Modes
modes.description: Choose from meeting minutes, feedback forms, and other predefined analyses

pin.title: Quick Access
pin.description: Pin your favorite modes to have them ready when recording

feedback.title: Direct Communication
feedback.description: Use the feedback mode to send ideas and suggestions directly to the Memoro team

create_blueprint.title: Discover Memoro: Create Blueprint
create_blueprint.message: Here you can create your own AI analysis templates for your specific needs.

prompts.title: Discover Memoro: Prompts - AI Commands
prompts.message: Prompts are specific instructions for AI processing of your recordings.

tags.title: Discover Memoro: Manage Tags
tags.message: Here you can organize, edit, and create new tags for your memos.

sort.title: Sort & Color
sort.description: Choose colors for tags and sort the list by long pressing

pin.title: Pin Tags
pin.description: Pin tags directly to your memos page. Tap a tag to filter

configurable.title: Fully Configurable
configurable.description: Use tags for status updates, person names, or topics. Get creative

map.title: Discover Memoro: Map
map.message: Here you can see all your memos on a map based on their recording location.

memories.title: Discover Memoro: Memories
memories.message: Here you'll find special moments and important recordings from your history.

statistics.title: Discover Memoro: Statistics
statistics.message: Here you can see detailed statistics about your usage and recordings.

streaks.title: Productivity Streaks
streaks.description: Track your recording streaks and stay motivated

analytics.title: Recording Locations
analytics.description: See where you record - enable location in settings

insights.title: Audio Insights
insights.description: Understand your speaking speed and recording habits

subscription.title: Discover Memoro: Subscription
subscription.message: Here you manage your subscription and see your current Mana usage.

mana.title: Mana Powers Everything
mana.description: Use Mana for AI processing of your recordings

flexible.title: Flexible Pricing
flexible.description: Subscription or one-time purchase - choose what fits you

transparent.title: Transparent Usage
transparent.description: See exactly how much Mana you use for which actions

cross_app.title: Cross-App Usage
cross_app.description: Use your Mana across all Mana apps with one account.

recording.title: Recording
recording.description: Record meetings and ideas effortlessly with automatic transcription.

summarizing.title: Summarize
summarizing.description: Create intelligent summaries and custom formats with AI support.

combining.title: Combine Memos
combining.description: Merge multiple memos into comprehensive documents.

questioning.title: Query Memos
questioning.description: Ask questions about your memos and get precise answers.

organizing.title: Organize with Tags
organizing.description: Organize your memos with tags, filters, and search functions.

sharing.title: Share & Inform
sharing.description: Share memos with others and keep everyone updated.

web_access.title: Web Access
web_access.description: Access your memos from anywhere - browser or app.

credits.insufficient_message: You don't have enough Mana for this operation.
credits.insufficient_subtitle: Top up your account to continue.
credits.memo_saved_locally: Your memo has been saved on the device and can be uploaded via the audio archive once Mana is available again.

b2b.title: Enterprise Account

b2b.contact_admin: For billing questions, please contact your organization administrator.

rating.thank_you_message: Your support means a lot to us!
rating.rate_app_message: Would you like to rate Memoro in the App Store?

upload.title: Upload Audio/Video
upload.description: Select an audio or video file and configure recording settings.

reprocess.title: Reprocess Memo
reprocess.description: Configure settings for reprocessing the memo.
reprocess.processing_memo: The memo is being processed with the new settings.
reprocess.success: Memo is being reprocessed. You will receive a notification when processing is complete.
reprocess.error: An error occurred while reprocessing the memo.

migration.data_transferred: All your data has been securely transferred
migration.loyalty_bonus_simple: Thank you for your loyalty! As an existing customer, you receive permanently 33% more Mana each month.
migration.mana_credits_desc: Use Mana Credits for AI features. Every action has transparent costs and you stay in full control.
migration.question_memos_desc: Ask questions about your memos and receive intelligent answers based on your recordings.
migration.combine_memos_desc: Connect multiple memos into a cohesive story or summary.
migration.no_google_analytics_desc: We have completely removed Google Analytics
migration.opensource_analytics_desc: Privacy-friendly analytics with servers in Europe
migration.opensource_database_desc: Highest security standards with encrypted storage
migration.data_stays_eu: All Data Stays in the EU
migration.data_stays_eu_desc: No transfer to third countries - GDPR compliant
migration.free_plan_message: All your data has been successfully transferred. You can use Memoro for free or subscribe anytime.
